questions.question: Why do neural networks improve over time?
options: Because they receive more computing power
Because they adjust their weights using correct answers
Because they store all past inputs

questions.question: What best describes how a neural network makes predictions?
options: By understanding the meaning of the data
By learning statistical patterns from examples

questions.question: What limits the accuracy of a neural network?
options: The size of the computer screen
The speed of the internet connection
The quality of the training data

questions.question: Which statement is true about neural networks?
options: They understand language the same way people do
They learn by adjusting internal connections
